subject: Iskender tray arrived cold at TCC fall fundraiser Nov 15
description: The iskender tray delivered at 6:20pm arrived below spec temperature. Jason called personally, replacement plate delivered 6:40pm. Documenting for QA.

subject: Missing baklava tray on Erdogan wedding delivery
description: One baklava tray short on the 8pm dessert set. Yusuf drove second tray direct from Main Street, arrived 8:35pm.

subject: Wrong kebab count on Passaic Bar November luncheon
description: Bar reported 5 short on the kebab count. Verified against invoice — will credit 5% off next month's booking.

subject: Online order 8817 kaşarlı pide missing
description: Customer reports kaşarlı pide missing from delivery. Refund issued $14. Second pide dispatched free.

subject: Question: is the Ramadan iftar package halal-certified end-to-end?
description: Confirmed all meat sourced from Green Village Packing (halal-certified Pennsylvania slaughterhouse). No cross-contamination in kitchen.

subject: Delivery timing question — Wayne YMCA halal buffet Dec 8
description: Confirmed 11:00am delivery, setup complete by 11:30. Signed off.

subject: Bill dispute on Chamber Dec luncheon — 82 heads billed vs 80 confirmed
description: Two additional walk-ins accepted at door. Chamber acknowledged, no adjustment needed.

subject: Yilmaz Sunnet — additional 10 guests day-of, can we add?
description: Yusuf added 10 covers day-of at $30/head incremental. Confirmed with client.

subject: St. Joseph's biweekly lunch — allergy on kebab wrap
description: Nut allergy flagged on one order. Confirmed no nuts in Adana blend or lamb marinade. Kelly notified.

subject: Online order 8921 arrived late (over 60 min)
description: Delivery driver hit Route 23 traffic. $10 credit issued.

subject: WPU semester reception — vegetarian option request for 6 guests
description: Confirmed 6 lahmacun (vegetarian) portions added to menu. No upcharge.

subject: Aksoy nişan — final headcount change from 60 to 65
description: Final invoice will bill 65 heads at agreed rate. Awaiting Aksoy confirmation.

subject: Ridgewood Turkish Society coffee hour — proposed date change
description: Client wants to shift date from March to February. Reviewing calendar.

subject: BC Halal Fund — invoice for community meals Wave 1
description: Wave 1 invoice sent, 40 heads at $32. Confirmed via Stripe.

subject: Wayne Rotary Feb dinner — menu print copy question
description: Provided printer-friendly PDF of menu; Rotary handled printing internally.

subject: Passaic Islamic Center iftar RSVP list format
description: Sent CSV template. PIC prefers Google Sheet for RSVP intake.

subject: Online order 9012 - wrong sauce provided
description: Customer ordered garlic yogurt, received chili paste. $5 credit + replacement sauce free next order.

subject: Fatih Nikah - venue confirmation
description: Confirmed 45 guests, Nov 8 setup. Coordinating with Basaran family (venue).

subject: Online order 9145 - request for repeat weekly catering
description: Customer requesting weekly office lunch catering. Referred to Derya to build corporate proposal.

subject: Online order 9187 - late-night delivery pilot request
description: Customer asking if Anatolia will pilot late-night delivery. Reviewing with Osman for Wayne kitchen capacity.
